data.title: Update add_dependency() tests for level-scoped cycle detection
data.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Description
Extend tests/scripts/test_ticket_graph.py with failing tests asserting that add_dependency() raises CyclicDependencyError when level-scoped cycle detection triggers. These tests must FAIL (RED) before Task 4 wires check_cycle_at_level into add_dependency(). After Task 4, they must pass.

## Implementation Steps
1. Add test_add_dependency_raises_on_cycle_at_level() to tests/scripts/test_ticket_graph.py:
   - Setup: create tmp .tickets-tracker/ with epic-A and epic-B (both ticket_type="epic", no parent_id). Write a depends_on LINK event from epic-B to epic-A (B→A exists).
   - Action: call add_dependency("epic-A", "epic-B", tracker_dir, "depends_on") — adding A→B would close the loop.
   - Assert: raises CyclicDependencyError.

2. Add test_add_dependency_raises_on_self_loop_at_level() to tests/scripts/test_ticket_graph.py:
   - Setup: create tmp .tickets-tracker/ with epic-A (ticket_type="epic", no parent_id).
   - Action: call add_dependency("epic-A", "epic-A", tracker_dir, "depends_on").
   - Assert: raises CyclicDependencyError.
   (Note: after S2 integration, resolve_hierarchy_link on same ticket returns source==target, triggering self-loop detection in check_cycle_at_level)

3. Update .test-index to add RED marker: [test_add_dependency_raises_on_cycle_at_level] for plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-graph.py.

## Test Approach (Given/When/Then)
Given a synthetic tracker with epic-B already depending on epic-A (B→A),
When add_dependency("epic-A", "epic-B", tracker_dir, "depends_on") is called,
Then CyclicDependencyError is raised and no new LINK event is written to epic-A's directory.

## Files
- tests/scripts/test_ticket_graph.py (modify — add test functions)
- .test-index (modify — add RED marker)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0) with RED markers protecting new failing tests
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format --check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] test function test_add_dependency_raises_on_cycle_at_level exists
  Verify: grep -q "def test_add_dependency_raises_on_cycle_at_level" tests/scripts/test_ticket_graph.py
- [ ] test function test_add_dependency_raises_on_self_loop_at_level exists
  Verify: grep -q "def test_add_dependency_raises_on_self_loop_at_level" tests/scripts/test_ticket_graph.py
- [ ] New tests return non-zero (RED) before Task 4 integration
  Verify: python3 -m pytest tests/scripts/test_ticket_graph.py::test_add_dependency_raises_on_cycle_at_level -x 2>&1 | grep -q "FAILED\|ERROR\|AssertionError"
- [ ] .test-index contains RED marker [test_add_dependency_raises_on_cycle_at_level] for plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-graph.py
  Verify: grep "\[test_add_dependency_raises_on_cycle_at_level\]" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
